number.description: Set this to the current version number incremented by one

minorEdit.description:
If `minorEdit` is set to 'true', no notification email or activity
stream will be generated for the change.

contentTypeModified.description: True if content type is modifed in this version (e.g. page to blog)

confRev.description: The revision id provided by confluence to be used as a revision in Synchrony

syncRev.description: The revision id provided by Synchrony
